name: Onion Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onions and make rings approximately 1/2 inch in width.
2. Dip each onion ring into buttermilk, then coat with flour.
3. Re-dip in buttermilk again, followed by coating with unsalted cracker meal.
4. (Works best using the "wet hand, dry hand" method.)
5. Place rings onto wax paper, separating layers with additional sheets of wax paper.
6. Allow to refrigerate overnight to allow the batter to set.
7. Deep fry until golden-brown. Salt at serving time if desired.
8. Enjoy!
